testsuite.name: turbomq.broker.GossipProtocolTest
testsuite.system-out: 09:05:19.432 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.433 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Self-refutation: bumped incarnation to 1 09:05:19.434 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.435 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.436 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.438 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.438 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 restored to ALIVE via indirect ping 09:05:19.439 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.441 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.442 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.442 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 declared DEAD (suspect timeout expired) 09:05:19.443 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-3 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.443 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-3 declared DEAD (suspect timeout expired)
